description: Welcome to Terramor by Polygon! Nestled in the heart of Lougheed Town Centre, this stunning 3-bed, 3-bath townhome offers an open, functional layout. The chef’s kitchen shines with granite counters, a gas range, and abundant natural light. Enjoy 9' ceilings and seamless indoor-outdoor living with a private fenced backyard and balcony. Upstairs features a spacious master suite with a double-sink ensuite,laundry, and two generous bedrooms. Resort-Style Amenities: Access 5,500 sqft of luxury including an outdoor pool, hot tub, sauna, gym, yoga studio, and indoor mini-golf. Ideally located minutes from Skytrain, Lougheed Mall, Hwy 1 and all levels of school. do not miss.
